case_title: EUREKABANK A FEDERA SAVINGS BANK VS WONG LEO LAP WING DBA MONTGOMERY CLNRS AND TAILORS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY EUREKABANK A FEDERA SAVINGS BANK AS TO DEFENDANT WONG LEO LAP WING DBA MONTGOMERY CLNRS AND TAILORS WONG JEANNE KU DBA MONTGOMERY CLEANERS AND TAILORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EUREKABANK A FEDERA SAVINGS BANK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WONG LEO LAP WING DBA MONTGOMERY CLNRS AND TAILORS WONG JEANNE KU DBA MONTGOMERY CLEANERS AND TAILORS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
